title: AIS Metrics Audit Event
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for a single audit event emitted when an agent executes a governed activity. Events are written to audit/events/ as YAML or JSON files. Conforms to the scribe-governance-agent logging contract.

$schema.description: Schema URI identifying the event format version.

event_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this audit event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the event was emitted (UTC).

agent.description: Kebab-case name of the agent that performed the activity (e.g., 'backend-developer-agent'). Must match an entry in the agent catalog.

activity.description: Human-readable name of the specific governed activity that was performed (e.g., 'Implement REST API Endpoint').

ais_step.description: The AIS Specify SDLC step this activity belongs to.

autonomy_level.description: The autonomy level at which the activity was actually performed.

duration_seconds.description: How long the activity took from start to completion in seconds. Null if not measured.

outcome.description: The result of the governed activity.

evidence.description: File paths relative to the repository root or human-readable descriptions of artifacts produced as evidence of this activity.

human_approved_by.description: GitHub username of the person who provided human approval, if applicable. Null if no human approval was required or if approval is still pending.

session_id.description: Framework workflow session ID linking this event to a broader workflow run. Null if not associated with a session.

governance_entry_id.description: The governance registry entry ID that authorized this activity. Should match an entry in governance-registry.yaml.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value map for additional context. Values must be strings, numbers, booleans, or null. Use for agent-specific telemetry not covered by top-level fields.
